pageTitle: cyResponse submitted. You must pay your counterclaim fee
responseSubmittedCounterClaimFeePaymentN: cyWe’ve sent you a confirmation email.
cyPay your counterclaim fee. If you do not, your counterclaim will not be considered.

cyA hearing date will be scheduled. You’ll get a notification telling you when this has happened. At the hearing, a judge will listen to both sides and make a decision. You should come to the hearing.
cySome people need support to use HMCTS services, like step-free access to a court for a hearing. If you have not already, you should request support now (opens in new tab).
